phrases.en: Pam and Dan sit down at the table.
Pam drinks some coffee from her mug.
phrases.zh: 帕姆用她的马克杯喝一些咖啡。

phrases.en: And has an egg with bacon and toast.
phrases.zh: 再吃一个鸡蛋，配培根和吐司。

phrases.en: Sometimes, he dips his toast into the yolk of his egg.
phrases.zh: 有时候，他把吐司蘸进蛋黄里。

phrases.en: As they eat, they read the paper.
It says here that taxes are going up.
After eating, they wipe their lips with their napkins.
phrases.zh: 吃完后，他们用餐巾擦嘴。
